span.p:
Query compiler — LLM call #1
intent → concrete research topics

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SearchPlan (editable chips)
anchor topics · categories ·
date window · code filter

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 0 — SQL filters
categories · date · has-code

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 1 — dense retrieval
whole-intent + best-topic blend
(multi-anchor)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 1b — BM25 lexical index
fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion
(exact terminology dense search blurs)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 2 — signal blend (config)
recency · has-code · citations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 3 — cross-encoder rerank
(flag, local ONNX; off by default —
measured as a wash here)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Wildcard slots — 2 high-relevance papers
from OUTSIDE the experience cluster
(exploration guardrail: experience
similarity never ranks or gates)

span.p:
enrich CLI — citations (Semantic Scholar)
+ GitHub stars (quality priors)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Personalized analysis — LLM call #2 per paper
learnable ≠ blocker · learning bridge ·
goal alignment · project score (cached per profile version)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Telemetry (append-only)
SearchEvents: plan + ranked results
InteractionEvents: bookmark/analyze/not-interested
joined to (search, rank)

eval search — token-free
nDCG@10 · Recall@50 · MRR

span.p:
eval bias — skew report:
category/recency/length vs pool ·
comfort-zone drift · wildcard yield ·
interleaving scoreboard

span.p:
eval adopt — real logged
queries join the eval set

span.p:
eval tune — offline weight grid
(recency · code · citations); prints best,
a human applies via config
